goal: Daily board 'From the deck' name was hardcoded 'Velvet Familiar' (not even a real deck) for all users
root_cause: daily.html/th/daily.html .daily-topbar__deck-name was a static 'Velvet Familiar' string with no JS wiring — 'velvet-familiar' isn't in DECKS at all, so every user saw a fake deck name even though the board's card backs render the real active deck (getActiveDeckId via getCardBackUrl). Real-backs + fake-name mismatch.
fix: renderDeckName() in js/main.js (called from renderDaily next to renderStreakChip) sets the name from the active deck: getAllDecks().find(d=>d.id===getActiveDeckId()), localized (deck names ARE translated — name_th on TH, unlike card names). Static placeholder de-faked to the default deck Moonmallow / เหมียวฝันหวาน.
verified: Local (chrome-devtools, cache-busted): active deck boba-oracle -> EN 'Boba Oracle', TH 'แมวชานม'.
